parts.text: My creatinine was 70 on 1 January 2026 and 110 on 2 January 2026. Is that ok?
My creatinine reading went from 100 on 2026-03-01 to 160 on 2026-03-06. What does that mean?
My latest eGFR is 25 and my ACR is 15 mg/mmol. What should I make of this?
My eGFR came back as 18. Can you explain what that means for me?
My urine ACR is 85 mg/mmol and my eGFR is 55. What does this tell me?
My haemoglobin is 105 g/L and my eGFR is 40. I've been very tired. What should I do?
My eGFR is 28 and my urine ACR is 90 mg/mmol. How worried should I be?
Over the last two days I'm passing much less urine, my legs and ankles are swollen, and I feel breathless. I have CKD.
